positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a mystical cosmic forest silhouette. The scene features giant, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, whimsical astral fauna like crystalline butterflies and fox spirits, and ancient, twisting root structures. The overall mood is magical and serene. Style: Mid-century modern graphic art meets Art Nouveau fantasy illustration. Composition: Central, symmetrical arrangement optimized for a full print. Colors: Deep indigo, vivid turquoise, electric purple, contrasted with pure white and neon yellow glow accents. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting creating strong silhouettes and highlighting the glowing elements. Print-friendly details: Crisp lines, flat areas of solid color for easy printing, suitable for apparel placement.
negative: blurry, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, lowres, monochrome, grainy, poor composition, dirty, messy, photographic, realistic
